topic: new oak and tannin contribution to white wine
trigger_keywords: afirmaciones sobre la crianza en barrica nueva
barricas nuevas pueden aportar taninos adicionales a los vinos blancos

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A white wine ferments or matures in a new oak barrel.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Because the wood has not been depleted by previous use, oak-derived tannins and other phenolic compounds can dissolve into the wine.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The white wine can gain additional phenolic structure and tannin alongside oak aromas; the amount depends on barrel and contact conditions.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: New oak can contribute wood-derived tannins to white wine through extraction during contact.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
